str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - programming-tips
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: How to Transition from Coding Tutorials to Real Projects
entry.summary: Learn how to move from coding tutorials to real projects effectively! Discover 15 actionable tips, from setting achievable milestones to embracing version control. Start your journey to becoming a proficient developer today.

entry.title: How to Overcome the Fear of Failure in Coding
entry.summary: Learn how to conquer the fear of failure in coding with our comprehensive guide. Discover 15 practical strategies, from setting realistic goals to embracing a growth mindset. Overcome obstacles, celebrate progress, and thrive on your coding journey.

entry.title: How to Overcome the Fear of Making Mistakes in Coding
entry.summary: Conquer the fear of coding mistakes with our comprehensive guide! Learn essential strategies, foster a growth mindset, and join a supportive community. Overcome challenges and celebrate progress in your coding journey. Share this guide to empower fellow coders!
